MenuPage.label: Signature Cuisine
MenuPage.pageSubtitle: Peruvian flavors reinvented with contemporary technique

MenuData.e1_desc: Fresh corvina marinated in tiger's milk with soy, ginger, and sesame oil
MenuData.e2_desc: Premium salmon slices with ají amarillo sauce and criolla salsa
MenuData.e3_desc: Traditional Limeña causa with olive octopus, fresh avocado, and huancaína sauce
MenuData.p1_desc: Wok-seared tenderloin with caramelized onions, tomato, native potatoes, and jasmine rice
MenuData.p2_desc: Creamy arborio rice with prawns, scallops, squid, and saffron
MenuData.p3_desc: Charcoal-grilled octopus tentacles with purple sweet potato purée and huacatay chimichurri
MenuData.c1_desc: Quebranta pisco, fresh passion fruit, lemon verbena syrup, and egg white foam
MenuData.c2_desc: Artisanal Peruvian gin, Campari, red vermouth, and smoked orange twist
MenuData.c3_desc: Reduced chicha morada, Italia pisco, lime, cinnamon syrup, and angostura bitters
MenuData.d1_desc: Dulce de leche cream, smoked Italian meringue, and cinnamon powder
MenuData.d2_desc: 70% cacao chocolate cake with molten center and bourbon vanilla ice cream
